title: elaphoglossum punae
intro: Elaphoglossum punae is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, known for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum punae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, and it is often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to promote overall well-being and skin health.
